summary: SINGLE_FOCUS NumberLine on [0, 1]. Open dense sets U_n remove rationals p/q with q ≤ n shown as RED punctures of radius 0.35/q via always_redraw. ValueTracker n_tr steps n=1..12. Labels for small q. Live n, count of rationals removed, and Baire-category conclusion that ∩U_n=irrationals still dense.
